violations.text: Establishment was unable to provide proof of vomit and diarrhea clean up procedures. Provided procedures to establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

Inspector observed the 1 door reach in refrigerator ambient air temperature at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. The PIC turned the temperature control knob to a colder setting. corrected temp. 40 degrees fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/20/2018
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chloride sanitizing solution for the 3-bay. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2025

The ceilings and walls in the kitchen area is covered with materials that are not smooth, durable, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable. Some tiles are stained. Per interview of staff, the kitchen will be renovated and walls and ceiling tiles will be replaced within the year. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025
